title: Catch for Organizers — consolidated host-app manifest
supersedes: host-coverage-manifest.json (v1 — route→design coverage of the OLD club-shaped IA)
purpose: Single source of truth for the NEW host app (the 'Catch for Organizers' redesign). Maps the new lifecycle-shaped IA to the catalogue widgets it is built from, re-homes every surface the old app covered (so nothing is lost), and flags the functional regressions the redesign prototype introduced as stubs. The Host App gallery + coverage report render from this.
thesis: A host lives in two objects on two cadences: the Organizer (a brand, set-and-forget) and the Event (the whole job, every week + live on the night). The old IA spent two of four tabs on the club; the new IA makes the EVENT LIFECYCLE the spine — create → fill → run → report — and lets the Organizer be the calm brand surface behind it. Source rationale: explorations/host-ia-review/HostIAReview.html.

old.note: Cleaved out of the consumer app; club-shaped. Faithfully rebuilt on-system as templates/host-* (v1 coverage).

tabs.label: Today
tabs.absorbs: the old Events ops-home, reborn as a time-aware ops surface
owns: NextUpHero (next/live event in the dark register)
NeedsYouQueue (cross-event triage: approvals, waitlist, guest Qs, drafts)

tabs.label: Events
tabs.absorbs: the old Events list + the create entry buried under Clubs

tabs.label: Organizer
tabs.absorbs: the old Clubs (Edit/Preview) + Account (profile) — merged into one brand surface

destinations.label: Manage event
destinations.from: Events row / Today hero / NeedsYou item
destinations.absorbs: the old Manage (Setup/Live/Report) + the dedicated /attendance route + the Event Success run-of-show console

destinations.label: Insights
destinations.absorbs: the old Clubs › Insights sub-tab (host analytics)

rehoming._comment: Every routed screen + non-routed surface from the v1 coverage manifest, mapped to its home in the NEW IA. status: preserved (same job, new place) · improved (job + UX upgraded) · relocated (moved tab) · at-risk (stubbed in the prototype — see regressions[]) · shared (consumer screen, untouched).

routes.note: Ops-home split into a time-aware Today (hero + NeedsYou) and an event-lifecycle Events list.
Brand identity/team/payouts/defaults → Organizer. Analytics → its own Insights destination (no longer a tab-in-a-tab). Preview → 'How guests see you'.
Reframed club→organizer. Wizard NOT in the redesign prototype. Re-home templates/host-create-club. See R3.
Re-home templates/host-edit-club under Organizer. See R3.
Stubbed as a toast in the prototype. Re-home templates/host-create-event; add the Repeat-last prefilled clone path (Flows.html). See R1.
Adds a Guests mode, a context bar, lifecycle-default mode, and folds the Event Success console into Live run-of-show. Resolves v1 divergence D1.
Stubbed as a toast. Re-home templates/host-edit-event (locks schedule/policy once booked). See R2.
Promoted to the big check-in affordance during Live. Resolves v1 divergence D4.
The undesigned-in-v1 console is now the LiveConsole + Report. Resolves v1 divergence D1.
Host profile rejoins the brand (Organizer); sign-out demoted to an Organizer row. Resolves v1 divergence D2 framing.
Was MISSING in v1. Provide as the Organizer profile editor. See R3.

surfaces.new: Today → 'Finish your draft' NeedsYou item + Events
surfaces.note: Re-home templates/host-draft-picker as the draft entry. See R4.
Nudge present; sheet stubbed. Re-home templates/host-payouts-handoff. See R4.

surfaces.old: Remove host / Transfer ownership / Cancel event (dialogs)
surfaces.new: Team mgmt + Manage → Setup → danger zone

surfaces.note: Was MISSING in v1 (v1 divergence D3). Add to the re-homed dialog set.
Was MISSING in v1 (v1 divergence D3). Add.
Still undesigned (UX audit 'Missing flows & states'). Tracked, not yet built.

regressions.fix: Re-home the existing 5-step templates/host-create-event under Events; add the Repeat-last prefilled clone (prototype + Flows.html spec). Until done, the redesign loses the single most-frequent creative act.
Re-home templates/host-edit-event (locks schedule/policy once bookings exist).
Re-home templates/host-create-club + host-edit-club as Create/Edit organizer; add the profile editor (old hostProfileScreen, never designed).

regressions.what: Team dialogs, payouts hand-off, draft picker stubbed as toasts
regressions.fix: Re-home host-add-host, host-dialogs, host-payouts-handoff, host-draft-picker; add Delete-event + Invite-link dialogs (v1 D3).

regressions.what: Onboarding / auth / empty / loading / error states unbuilt
regressions.fix: Design the once-but-critical entry + degraded paths (UX audit). Not in old coverage either — net-new, tracked.

widgets._comment: The redesign must be composed PURELY of catalogue widgets. This maps each redesign element to either an existing catalogue component (reuse) or a new one to promote (build). Existing: components/<group>/<Name>. New ones get jsx + d.ts + *.card.html in components/hosting or components/dashboard.

reuse.redesign: Status bar / app bar / tab dock

reuse.catalogue: core/Stepper, core/StepHeader, core/Field, core/FieldGroup, core/TextField, core/OptionCard, core/OptionGroup, core/MapPicker

build.name: NextUpHero
build.why: Time-aware marquee for the next/live event in the reserved dark register, pigment-glowed, state chip, face-pile, stateful CTA. No catalogue equivalent. (NEW_WIDGETS.md)

build.name: NeedsYouQueue
build.why: Cross-event triage list with inline resolve + count chips. No equivalent.

build.name: EventLifecycleRow
build.why: Event-first list row: pigment spine, date block, lifecycle tag, fill bar, state-aware trailing. (DashboardEventCard is club-nested; this is event-first.)

build.name: FacePile
build.why: Overlapping avatar stack +N, light & dark ring variants. Recurs across hero/peek/rows.

build.name: OrganizerHeader
build.why: Merged brand+host identity surface (logo, name, verified, formats). Encodes club→organizer reframe.

build.name: TrendStrip
build.why: Compact cross-event KPIs over a sparkline; the Organizer→Insights teaser.

build.name: SegPill
build.why: Segmented pill control (ranges, lifecycle filters, modes). Replaces stacked underline OptionGroups for filters.

build.name: MetricGrid / StatCard
build.why: 2-col metric tiles with value/label/delta + ready/partial/missing states; used on Setup, Report, Organizer, Insights.

build.name: BlastComposer
build.why: Event-scoped broadcast: audience picker + templates + send. (Sheet hosts it.)

build.name: DateRangePicker
build.why: Presets + custom dual-month calendar range. Already prototyped (CalendarPrimitive.html); promote it.

divergences_vs_code.note: Event Success run-of-show console — now the Manage Live LiveConsole + Report.
Host profile rejoins the brand (Organizer); the separate profile editor is provided.
Delete-unused-event + Create-invite-link dialogs — add to the re-homed dialog set (R4).
'Unsaved changes' dialog is designed but has no code; drafts auto-save. Keep as proposal or drop.

buildplan: 1. Promote the 10 'build' widgets to the catalogue (jsx + d.ts + *.card.html), reusing core/avatar, tones, Badge, Button.
2. Rebuild the 4 tabs + Manage + Insights as DC templates composed ONLY of catalogue widgets (templates/hosts-*).

3. Re-home the existing flow/sheet templates (create/edit event+club, dialogs, payouts, draft, success) under the new IA so no functionality is lost; add the two missing dialogs (D3) + the profile editor.
4. Rewrite Host App.html as the new gallery (tabs + Manage + Insights + flows + new component cards) and re-point the coverage report at this manifest.
5. Keep explorations/host-redesign + host-ia-review as the referenced research archive; fold their rationale into the decisions doc.

research_index._comment: No net loss — every research artifact is retained and referenced here.
research_index.ia_rationale: explorations/host-ia-review/HostIAReview.html (thesis, frequency×stakes, competitor scan, before/after re-cut, highest-leverage moves)
research_index.ux_punch_list: explorations/host-redesign/UX_AUDIT.html (74 improvements tagged altitude×priority — folded into the decisions doc)
research_index.v1_coverage: host-coverage-manifest.json (route→design coverage of the old IA — retained as the code-spine audit)
